name: Corsica Set of 2 Wicker Dining Chair with Cushions: Weather-Resistant & UV-Protected - Christopher Knight Home
description: Enhance your patio with this Christopher Knight Home Corsica Set of 2 Wicker Dining Chair with Cushions. This stylish set of two chairs includes removable water resistant cushions for maximum comfort. This all weather wicker furniture is a traditional choice that can be easily incorporated into any design scheme. These sturdy outdoor dining chairs are an excellent addition to your patio table or you can place them around your outdoor space to provide extra seating. You will be happy you purchased these Christopher Knight Home Corsica Set of 2 Wicker Dining Chair with Cushions next time you have guests over.
